name: writing-assistant
description: 自媒体写作交互式助手。帮助完成从选题到发布的完整流程。适用于：开始写新文章、检查草稿质量、诊断发布后数据不佳的原因。
capabilities: Guide topic selection using three-dimensional matching method
Structure outlines using sales funnel methodology
Write body text with cognitive science principles
Create engaging titles with numeric impact formulas
author: Ceeon
securitySummary: Pure markdown documentation skill with zero executable code. All static findings are false positives: markdown code blocks flagged as shell execution, Chinese documentation entropy flagged as obfuscation, and metadata URLs flagged as network calls. No security risks present.
valueStatement: Content creators often struggle with inconsistent quality and poor reader engagement. This skill provides a complete framework from topic selection to final formatting using proven methodologies and quality checklists.
userTitle: Structure your writing with proven workflow methodology
limitations: Requires manual input of user context and goals
Templates require customization for specific niches
No automatic content generation from keywords
Platform-specific formatting focuses on WeChat public accounts

useCases.title: New article workflow
useCases.description: Follow complete workflow from topic research to final formatting for new articles

useCases.title: Quality assessment
useCases.description: Use checklists to evaluate draft quality and identify improvement areas

useCases.title: Content diagnosis
useCases.description: Diagnose why published content underperforms using systematic analysis

promptTemplates.title: New article
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me write an article about [topic]. First, I will read user-personas.md to understand target audiences.

promptTemplates.title: Draft review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review my draft using the checklist in SKILL.md. Check each item and give me a score with improvement suggestions.

promptTemplates.title: Title creation
promptTemplates.prompt: Create 5 title options for my article about [topic] using the title methodology in methods/04-标题.md.

promptTemplates.title: Performance diagnosis
promptTemplates.prompt: My article about [topic] has low engagement. Use the checklist in SKILL.md to help me identify what went wrong.

bestPractices: Always read user-personas.md first to understand target audiences
Use the checklist before publishing - aim for 80% or higher score
Apply term simplification to make content accessible to beginners
antiPatterns: Skipping the topic research phase leads to redundant content
Using technical jargon without explanation alienates readers
Publishing without title testing reduces click-through rates

faq.question: What platforms does this skill support?
faq.answer: Focuses on WeChat public accounts but principles apply to any content platform like Zhihu, Xiaohongshu, and blogs.

faq.question: How long does the complete workflow take?
faq.answer: Plan 1-2 hours for new articles including research. Draft review takes 15-30 minutes depending on length.

faq.question: Can I use this with other writing tools?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill provides methodology and structure. Combine with any editor or AI writing tool for content generation.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: This skill contains only markdown templates. No data is stored, transmitted, or accessed beyond your conversation.

faq.question: What if my draft scores below 60%?
faq.answer: Review the failing checklist items systematically. Common issues include missing why section, too few audience perspectives, and weak titles.

faq.question: How is this different from general writing AI?
faq.answer: Provides specific methodology with proven frameworks. Unlike general AI, it enforces quality standards through checklists and structured workflows.
